calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-17-2006 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-13-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: ELLEN R. FENICHEL FOR PLAINTIFF DARIEN MITCHELL, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY LAURA CHIERA FOR DEFENDANT EMARCO WASHINGTON WHO IS NOT PRESENT DUE TO CRIMINAL PROCEEDING THIS PM

THIS CAUSE COMES ON REGULARLY FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE THIS DAY. ALL PARTIES ARE PRESENT AS NOTED ABOVE. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS ARE HELD. SETTLEMENT AGREED TO BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL BUT NOT AGREED TO BY DEFENDANT.
CONDITIONAL TERMS ARE PUT ON THE RECORD AND TO BE FINALIZED UPON REACHING THE DEFENDANT BY CELL PHONE BEFORE 4PM TODAY.
DEFENDANT AGREES TO VACATE PREMISES KNOWN AS 1446 THOMAS AVE., SAN FRANCISCO, CA BY 5:00PM, FEBRUARY 3, 2006. PLAINTIFF WAIVES BACK RENT BUT RETAINS SECURITY DEPOSIT INCLUDING ANY ACCRUED INTEREST. PLAINTIFF WAIVES ALL CLAIMS AS TO RENTAL DAMAGES BUT NOT INCLUDING PROPERTY DAMAGES. IF DEFENDANT VACATES BY 5PM, FEBRUARY 3, 2006, LEAVING THE PREMISES FREE OF ALL PERSONAL BELONGINGS AND NO DAMAGE IS INCURRED TO THE PROPERTY, COMPLAINT WILL BE DISMISSED, WITHIN FIVE COURT DAYS AFTER FEB-3-2006. EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS.
IF DEFENDANT BREACHES THE TERMS, JUDGMENT WILL BE ENTERED BY EX PARTE APPLICATION AGAINST DEFENDANT BY FEB-06-2006 IN THE FOLLOWING AMOUNTS: $1,460.32 FOR PAST RENT FROM SEP-01-2005 TO OCT-14-2005; $32.88 PER DIEM FROM OCT-15-2005; $462.11 COURT FILING FEES AND SERVICE PROCESS; $850.00 FOR SECURITY DEPOSIT AND ALL FEES RELATING TO THE FILING AND ENFORCEMENT OF THE JUDGMENT.
4:07PM - MS. CHIERA REPORTS NO CONFIRMATION ON THE POTENTIAL SETTLEMENT FROM THE DEFENDANT; CASE NOT SETTLED. TRIAL DATE REMAINS.

JUDGE PRO TEM THOMAS DROHAN; CLERK CLARK BANAYAD; REPORTER JOANN BRYCE (218)
